allow: Bash(node -e " const d=[];process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d.push\(c\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try { const places=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(d\)\); places.forEach\(p=>console.log\(\\`[\\${p.category}] \\${p.title} | img:\\${p.image?'✓':'✗'}\\`\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Raw:', Buffer.concat\(d\).toString\(\).slice\(0,200\)\); } }\);" kill %1)

Bash(node -e " const d=[];process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d.push\(c\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try { const places=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(d\)\); places.forEach\(p=>console.log\(\\` [\\${p.category}] \\${p.title} | img:\\${p.image?'✓':'✗'}\\`\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(' Error:', Buffer.concat\(d\).toString\(\).slice\(0,100\)\); } }\);" done kill %1)
